_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED MANUALLY FOR PTERODACTYL PANEL IMPORT
name: Fragg 3.0 API
author: ethsmith@users.noreply.github.com
description: Pterodactyl egg for the Fragg 3.0 Node.js/TypeScript Express API. Installs from Git, builds the TypeScript project, and starts the compiled server on the primary allocation port.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
set -e

apk add --no-cache git

cd /mnt/server

if [ ! -f package.json ]; then
  if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo "GIT_ADDRESS is required when package.json is not already present."
    exit 1
  fi

  if [ -n "${GIT_BRANCH}" ]; then
    git clone --depth=1 --branch "${GIT_BRANCH}" "${GIT_ADDRESS}" .
  else
    git clone --depth=1 "${GIT_ADDRESS}" .
  fi
else
  echo "package.json found, skipping repository clone."
fi

if [ -f package-lock.json ]; then
  npm ci
else
  npm install
fi

npm run build
npm prune --omit=dev

variables.name: Git Repository
variables.description: Repository cloned during installation if package.json is not already present.

variables.name: MongoDB URI
variables.description: Full MongoDB connection string used by MONGODB_URI.

variables.name: MongoDB Database
variables.description: Optional database name used by MONGODB_DATABASE. Leave blank if the database is included in the MongoDB URI.

variables.name: API Key
variables.description: Shared secret required by protected write endpoints. Send it as Authorization: Bearer <key> or x-api-key.

variables.name: Debug Namespace
variables.description: Debug logging namespace. The default makes the API print its listening message for Pterodactyl startup detection.
